judge_reason: Both descriptions agree on the main visual elements (dark envelope, white lettering, circular postmark, 3-cent Jefferson stamp, upper left annotation) but Description B adds specific postmark details (city, date, time) and mentions wavy cancellation lines that A omits, without contradiction.
original_image_tags: A black-and-white photograph of a dark-colored envelope. The envelope is addressed in large, handwritten white capital letters. A circular postmark and a 3-cent U.S. postage stamp are visible in the upper right corner. A smaller, handwritten annotation is in the upper left corner.
A circular postmark stamped over the envelope.
A 3-cent United States Postage stamp featuring a profile portrait, likely of Thomas Jefferson.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: Black-and-white photograph of a dark envelope or postcard front with handwritten white lettering reading “THE CINCINNATI ENQUIRER,” a circular postmark dated “CINCINNATI, OHIO / JUL 31 / 9:30 PM / 1952,” and a U.S. postage stamp with wavy cancellation lines in the upper right.*
